caption: A man with glasses and dark hair tied back stands behind a microphone, performing in front of an audience. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with red embroidered detailing on the chest and a dark blue embroidered vest. He holds a guitar and appears to be singing. In the foreground, the backs of several audience members' heads are visible, including individuals with blonde, gray, and brown hair. One person wears a purple garment. The setting features a background of light-colored wooden slats. A black microphone on a stand is positioned in front of the man. The white text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a similar position, though his facial expression and mouth movements change slightly as he sings. The audience remains still, watching the performance.
